# Leak Sanitizer suppressions for OloEngine
#
# Third-party libraries that intentionally leak (global singletons, etc.)
# Add entries here to suppress known false positives from dependencies.
#
# Format: leak:<function_or_module_pattern>
#
# See: https://clang.llvm.org/docs/AddressSanitizer.html#suppressing-memory-leaks

# Mono runtime allocates global state that lives until process exit
leak:mono_

# GLFW allocates X11/Wayland display state that persists
leak:glfwInit

# Mesa/NVIDIA driver global state
leak:libGLX
leak:libEGL

# Task system singletons (scheduler, event pool) — intentional process-lifetime allocations
leak:FScheduler
leak:FSchedulerTls
leak:TEventPool
leak:TLazySingleton
leak:LowLevelTasks

# GameNetworkingSockets / protobuf / crypto — global state not fully cleaned up on exit
leak:GameNetworkingSockets
leak:SteamNetworkingSockets
leak:google::protobuf
leak:libprotobuf
leak:libcrypto
leak:libsodium
leak:libssl
